events.label: assistant

    \"Conductor selection does not comply with required insulation rating for the installed environment.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop cover-up or termination acceptance for the affected circuit until corrected.\",
    \"Verify the location classification and replace affected conductors with insulation listed for wet locations and sized per approved drawings and NEC ampacity requirements.\",
    \"Reinspect conductor markings, routing, and ampacity after replacement before closeout.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"Conductors installed in wet locations must have insulation listed and marked for wet-location use. Table 310.16 supports ampacity selection, but it does not make an unsuitable insulation type acceptable for the environment. At rough-complete, the installed conductor is defective and non-compliant until replaced or otherwise corrected with approved wet-location-rated conductors.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 310 - Conductors for General Wiring\",
    \"NEC 310.10(C) - Conductors in wet locations\",
    \"NEC Table 310.16 - Allowable ampacities of insulated conductors\"
  ]
}
EOF
